title: President Rajapaksa Does not  hear the  Resounding “Gota Go Home”  Demand and Instead Hangs on, living   on the  memories of the conflict and the  unprovable 6.9 million  allegedly behind him.
body_lines: The great enemy of the truth is very often not the lie, deliberate, contrived, and dishonest, but the myth, persistent, persuasive, and unrealistic.

In a lighter vein, I amuse that President Kennedy’s above quote would have been partly motivated by a premonition he had of what would happen in Sri Lanka in 2022! What else could one surmise when President Gotabaya Rajapaksa vows “to finish the remaining two years in his term despite months-long street protests calling for his ouster.” True, no President with all attached pomp and glory would depart the comfort zone only due to street protests.

Yet, President Rajapaksa declaring he would not recontest is realistic. It is not only due to street protests but the heard and unheard protests, curses, and complaints in all nooks and corners of Sri Lanka. No one will bargain with such echoing around and contest, to win. If someone says he would contest, it will turn out to be a myth, as President Kennedy said – a lie, deliberate, contrived, and dishonest too. Sure, no one even from the Pohottuwa expects him to contest, because they may face similar consequences as what United National Party contestants experienced in August 2019!

Whether he and the Pohottuwa Government has the mandate and popularity he and his supporters claim could be easily verified on the day he contests or if he wishes to get an early endorsement at the long-delayed Provincial Council Elections. The President’s prior intimation of not seeking reelection shows his conviction of the real popularity, though he does not want to depart immediately.

If he does not stand for reelection because he wishes to focus on “fixing a financial mess” it is well and good, but it will be understood as penance, paid by him since he led the team that caused the country’s economic mess. The new Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe who has taken over this responsibility needs no analysts to educate him.

It is common knowledge that the economic collapse was initiated with the reduction of tax revenue in December 2019, by revisions made to tax slots and Value Added Taxation, alleged duty waivers to friendly importers, and the collapse of farming due to the President’s dream of accelerated organic agriculture combined with prohibiting fertilizer imports, power, and energy supplies restrictions due to dollar shortage, delayed action with the International Monetary Fund and debt restructuring, supported by his grabbing concentrated political power by constitutional amendment manipulations, etc. Entanglement of the economic and political crisis is borne with the last. As the team leader, he is hounded by these errors.

He has gentlemanly accepted responsibility, of course very lightly, regarding two of these, calling them ‘mistakes,’ unknowing they are vast suicidal mistakes. The public wonders whether they should continue with him as the leader and accrue more suffering off his cavalier decision-making (as done already in governing) for the next two years or more. His supporters may in defense say, “Give him another chance!”

“I can’t go as a failed president,” President Rajapaksa has declared lamenting the committed mistakes. His failures have been admitted by him and even Minister Ali Sabry. President must be courageous to admit the rest too, as the leader of the team. He is a soldier, though retired! That is the way of officers and gentlemen.

When he speaks of failures, I can imagine the humorous giggle Ministers Harin Fernando and Manusha Nanayakkara share between them on that count, without embarrassing their political boss. Normally one expects ‘a failure’ to leave making way for another to correct the mistakes he has made. This was what Parliamentarians Harin Fernando and Manusha Nanayakkara yelled as if to bring down the Japanese chandeliers in the House.

But here is a President without a ray of hope or any semblance of showing any concrete corrective action to prove that any corrections are lined up. His only demand is to allow him to hold on to his glory, and show his ‘superiority,’ and ‘greatness,’ though extremely diluted even by prohibition to enter his Secretariat for two months.

One may sympathize with him when he reminds us about a mandate (6.9 million), which in our wildest dreams does not factually exist. No one will say that such a mandate is valid now. This is the understanding of farmers, laborers, public or private sector employees, youth who yell “Gota Go Home,” professionals, academics et al. But he does not hear it and lives on memories of the conflict and unprovable 6.9 million behind him.

The reports on his press briefing I saw (i.e., Business Standard) did not show his concerns on the most urgent issues faced by the community at large. To judge, let us look at one area. It is about essential medicine for children and vulnerable groups. For example, medicine for fits that should be in all pediatric wards or the vaccination against fatal rabies is not available in hospitals. It means children affected by fits must die, and unless the patients can afford to go to Chennai for anti-rabies vaccination must die.

PM Ranil Wickremesinghe with all his might tries to solve the crisis, and the President props up the PM with a business tycoon Dhammika Perera, in the background scenario of mastermind Basil Rajapaksa leaving the government and parliament. It will be interesting to evaluate whether Dhammika Perera could surmount well and truly tattooed failures of the Rajapaksa siblings.

These failures are not only domestic  wishful thinking but internationally identified. Let me quote what Senator Bob Menendez, Chairman of the US Senate Foreign Relations Committee had to say on 10th June 2022, who stated “Under the Rajapaksas, Sri Lanka has been left on the brink of financial ruin and humanitarian catastrophe. Mahinda Rajapaksa led his country straight into a Chinese debt trap and then his brother, Gotabaya Rajapaksa, failed to take the prudent economic steps necessary to avoid a default on its sovereign debt. Today, Sri Lankans of all backgrounds are rising to make clear that it is time for a change.”  This is the change Rajapaksa siblings attempt to halt, nullify! Do not tell that by this quote someone is propping the US, because this was a response to highlighting India’s and Japan’s positive steps in providing humanitarian assistance to Sri Lanka at the QUAD.

Under such circumstances, if he runs through his full term with added failures he will contribute to heightened economic run-down, political uncertainty, social unrest, and dilute and hide constitutional reform. In such an event he would rather have 20A intact as it will be an effective, safe, and beneficial constitutional therapy for him. However, it will certainly blur and delay great intentions and plans made by Namal Rajapaksa to reach the apex, duplicating Bongbong Marcos of the Philippines.

The President said: “What is this executive (powers) of the president? My opinion is that if you have a presidency, he must have full powers. Otherwise, abolish the executive presidency and go for full Westminster-style parliament.” Therefore, his being “skeptical about the success of a planned constitutional amendment” is no surprise. The last two and half years of executive presidency equated to no executive presidency for the good of the people, and his alternate option, (i.e., Westminster style) is not pursued by him either.

His statement that “Either the presidency should be abolished, or the parliament is kept out of governing.” shows his knowledge, understanding, exposure, and attitude toward existing constitutional democratic governance. He added, “I experienced this and now. know.”  What a jubilant period of two years’ experience to comparatively comment on centuries-old concepts like democracy! He suspected people might blame him for this utterance. He is right. If people blame only, not do any other, he ought to be extremely happy, lucky.

The usual past performance as Secretary of Defence is the hashtag he and his supporters wave always. Their conception that being a successful defense administrator or an urban developer qualifies a person more to be a Head of a State is disproved in the last two years plus. Peter’s Principle at work. Hence, even mentioning it to boost up performance becomes exhilarating humor.

Media said, “The president reiterated his controversial goal to push through “natural agriculture,” a short-lived move to ban chemical fertilizers that caused crop output to slump.” If it is to say that irrespective of the failures it is to be continued regardless, that itself will be a blunder.

Hope not so, especially with Indians rescuing our farmers with a credit line of USD 55 million for the procurement of urea fertilizer for the upcoming Yala season from India. The grandeur importance of this saving grace was observed with the PM Ranil Wickremesinghe, Minister of Agriculture Mahinda Amaraweera, Finance Secretary Mahinda Seneviratne, Indian High Commissioner Gopal Baglay, and Chief of PM’s Staff Sagala Ratnayaka, Advisor Dr. RHS Samaratunga and several others being present at the signing of the agreement.

We wish the President all success in bilateral negotiations with foreign heads as stated, with amiable diplomat Aruni Wijewardena in the Foreign Secretariat saddle. Certainly, he would have read the statements by the International Monetary Fund Chief and officials, the World Bank, Samantha Power of the USAID, Prime Minister Narendra Modi et al and educated him on what is required to attract them, especially ‘the political stability.

Further, stability is necessary for the economic and political fronts, and not as Pohottuwa General Secretary or some of his parliamentarians believe. Political stability will depend on constitutional reforms to which he and his party should contribute lavishly, but as appeared not forthcoming due to the citizenship issue affecting Basil Rajapaksa. However, with Basil Rajapaksa out of the equation now intense pressure on him will be reduced.

Therefore, he must observe external developments seriously and find a safe and convenient exit route with the help of PM Wickremesinghe. Planning to return home after two years plus, dashes the hopes of Gota Go Gama protestors who eternally yell, “Gota Go Home now!”

Finally, evaluation of his career as President opens a new learning experience. His contention about the baggage carried by longstanding politicos is right. Having been a short-term politician he also has allegedly seen carrying the baggage of his friends in the Military, business world, political advisors, freed convicts, and groups such as Viyath Maga and Eliya. Their weak support did not make him stronger but messed up his work.

Several of his picks from such entities and ‘baggage’ have deserted him, the latest being the Chairman of Litro who served only a few weeks, Vijitha Herath. Quite unfortunate. He can learn a page from the PM Wickremesinghe, how to pick excellent material from the ‘baggage’ and faithful with the return of Saman Ekanayaka, Dr. RHS Samaratunga, R Paskeralingam, et al to PM’s team, creating hope.

The President has said: “What are these executive (powers) of the president? My opinion is that if you have a presidency, he must have full powers. Otherwise, abolish the executive presidency and go for full Westminster-style parliament.” The turnaround he anticipates is the social demand too. Many agree with him, but demand his returning home immediately, irrespective of legal constraints. Simply told, people cannot wait until he “passes” the next ‘term-test’ on governance.

Though the President may not agree that his governance has failed him and the country, the protestors demand, “Get out of your comfort zone and bring comfort to others.” Those who yell so must be devastated having seen this media report. The yelling may echo, and broadcast more intense, acute, and dangerous actions. Pray it stays at yelling, and not what the world has experienced elsewhere with bloody ferocity and viciousness.  Nevertheless, the existing economic status may provoke such yelling to expand to dangerous calamities, if politicians do not address the economic and political issues properly, timely, efficiently, and effectively. Let all politicians be mindful of such a disaster, and not fertilize such.

si.title: "ගෝඨා ගෙදර යන්න" යන ඝෝෂාකාරී ඉල්ලීම ජනාධිපති රාජපක්ෂට නොඇසෙන අතර ඒ වෙනුවට එල්ලී සිටින්නේ ගැටුමේ මතකයන් සහ ඔහු පිටුපසින් සිටින බව කියන ඔප්පු කළ නොහැකි මිලියන 6.9 ක් මත ය.
body_lines: සත්‍යයේ මහා සතුරා බොහෝ විට බොරු, හිතාමතා, කුමන්ත්‍රණ සහ වංකකම නොව, මිථ්‍යාව, නොනැසී පවතින, ඒත්තු ගන්වන සහ යථාර්ථවාදී නොවේ.

ජනාධිපති කෙනඩිගේ ඉහත උද්ධෘතය 2022 දී ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සිදුවනු ඇති දේ ගැන ඔහුට තිබූ පෙරනිමිත්තකින් අර්ධ වශයෙන් පෙළඹවීමක් ඇති බව සැහැල්ලු නහරයකින් මම සතුටට පත් වෙමි! "ඔහුව නෙරපා හරින ලෙස ඉල්ලා සිටින මාස ගණනක් වීදි විරෝධතා නොතකා ඔහුගේ ධුර කාලය තුළ ඉතිරි වසර දෙක අවසන් කරන" බවට ජනාධිපති ගෝඨාභය රාජපක්ෂ සපථ කරන විට කෙනෙකුට අනුමාන කළ හැක්කේ වෙන කුමක්ද? වීදි උද්ඝෝෂණ නිසා පමණක් සියලු උජාරුවෙන් හා තේජසින් යුත් කිසිම ජනාධිපතිවරයකු සුවපහසු කලාපයෙන් පිටව නොයන බව ඇත්තකි.

එහෙත්, තමන් යළි තරග නොකරන බව ජනාධිපති රාජපක්ෂ ප්‍රකාශ කිරීම යථාර්ථවාදී ය. ඒ වීදි විරෝධතා නිසා පමණක් නොව ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සෑම අස්සක් මුල්ලක් නෑරම අසන නොඇසූ විරෝධතා, ශාප කිරීම් සහ පැමිණිලි නිසාය. කිසිවෙකු එවැනි දෝංකාරයක් සමඟ කේවල් කර ජයග්‍රහණය කිරීමට තරඟ නොකරනු ඇත. යමෙක් ඔහු තරඟ කරන බව පැවසුවහොත්, ජනාධිපති කෙනඩි පැවසූ පරිදි එය මිථ්‍යාවක් බවට පත්වනු ඇත - බොරුවක්, හිතාමතා, කුමන්ත්‍රණයක් සහ වංක ද. 2019 අගෝස්තු මාසයේදී එක්සත් ජාතික පක්ෂ තරඟකරුවන් අත්විඳින ලද ප්‍රතිවිපාකවලට සමාන ප්‍රතිවිපාකවලට ඔවුන් මුහුණ දිය හැකි නිසා ඔහු තරඟ කරනු ඇතැයි පොහොට්ටුවෙන්වත් කිසිවකු බලාපොරොත්තු නොවන බව සහතිකයි!

ඔහු සහ ඔහුගේ ආධාරකරුවන් කියන ජනවරම සහ ජනප්‍රියත්වය ඔහුට සහ පොහොට්ටුව රජයට තිබේද යන්න ඔහු තරඟ කරන දිනයේදී හෝ දිගු කලක් ප්‍රමාද වූ පළාත් සභා මැතිවරණයේදී ඔහුට ඉක්මන් අනුමැතියක් ලබා ගැනීමට අවශ්‍ය නම් පහසුවෙන් තහවුරු කර ගත හැකිය. නැවත තේරී පත්වීමට නොපැමිණෙන බවට ජනාධිපතිවරයාගේ පූර්ව දැනුම් දීමෙන් පෙනී යන්නේ ඔහු වහාම ඉවත්ව යාමට අකමැති වුවද සැබෑ ජනප්‍රියත්වය පිළිබඳ ඔහුගේ විශ්වාසයයි.

“මූල්‍ය අවුල නිවැරදි කිරීම” කෙරෙහි අවධානය යොමු කිරීමට අවශ්‍ය නිසා ඔහු නැවත මැතිවරණයකට ඉදිරිපත් නොවන්නේ නම් එය ඉතා හොඳයි, නමුත් එය රටේ ආර්ථික අවුල ඇති කළ කණ්ඩායමට නායකත්වය දුන් බැවින් ඔහු විසින් ගෙවූ පන්සිල් ලෙස තේරුම් ගනු ඇත. මේ වගකීම භාරගත් නව අගමැති රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතාට ඔහුව දැනුවත් කිරීමට විශ්ලේෂකයින් අවශ්‍ය නැත.

2019 දෙසැම්බරයේ බදු ආදායම අඩුවීමත් සමඟ බදු තලවල සංශෝධන සහ එකතු කළ අගය මත බදු අය කිරීම, හිතකාමී ආනයනකරුවන්ට සිදුවූ බව කියන තීරුබදු සහන, ජනාධිපතිතුමාගේ කඩිනම් සිහිනය නිසා ගොවිතැන කඩා වැටීමෙන් ආර්ථික කඩාවැටීම ආරම්භ වූ බව කවුරුත් දන්නා කරුණකි. කාබනික කෘෂිකර්මාන්තය, ඩොලර් හිඟය හේතුවෙන් පොහොර ආනයනය, බලශක්තිය සහ බලශක්ති සැපයුම සීමා කිරීම, ජාත්‍යන්තර මූල්‍ය අරමුදල සමඟ ප්‍රමාද වූ ක්‍රියාමාර්ග සහ ණය ප්‍රතිව්‍යුහගත කිරීම, ව්‍යවස්ථා සංශෝධන උපාමාරු මගින් සංකේන්ද්‍රිත දේශපාලන බලය උදුරා ගැනීම යනාදිය සමඟ ඒකාබද්ධ විය. අර්බුදය අන්තිමයා සමඟ දරා සිටී. කණ්ඩායම් නායකයා ලෙස ඔහු මෙම වැරදි නිසා හොල්මන් කරයි.

ඔහු මහත්මා වගකීම භාරගෙන ඇත, ඇත්තෙන්ම ඉතා සැහැල්ලුවෙන්, මෙයින් දෙකක් සම්බන්ධයෙන්, ඒවා 'වැරදි' ලෙස හඳුන්වමින්, ඒවා විශාල සියදිවි නසාගැනීමේ වැරදි බව නොදැන ය. ඉදිරි වසර දෙක හෝ ඊට වැඩි කාලයක් ඔහු නායකයා ලෙස ඉදිරියට ගෙන ගොස් ඔහුගේ අශ්වාරෝහක තීරණ ගැනීමෙන් (දැනටමත් ආණ්ඩුකරණයේදී සිදු කර ඇති පරිදි) තවත් දුක් විඳීමට සිදු විය යුතුද යන්න මහජනතාව කල්පනා කරයි. ඔහුගේ ආධාරකරුවන් ආරක්‍ෂාව වෙනුවෙන් “ඔහුට තවත් අවස්ථාවක් දෙන්න!” යැයි පැවසිය හැකිය.

"මට අසාර්ථක ජනාධිපතිවරයෙකු ලෙස යන්න බැහැ" යැයි ජනාධිපති රාජපක්ෂ මහතා ප්‍රකාශ කර ඇත්තේ සිදු වූ වැරදි ගැන විලාප තබමිනි. ඔහුගේ අසාර්ථකත්වය ඔහු සහ ඇමති අලි සබ්රි පවා පිළිගෙන ඇත. කණ්ඩායමේ නායකයා ලෙස ඉතිරි අයද පිළිගැනීමට ජනාධිපතිවරයා ධෛර්යවත් විය යුතුය. විශ්‍රාම ගියත් ඔහු සොල්දාදුවෙක්! ඒ නිලධාරීන්ගේ මහත්වරුන්ගේ ක්‍රමයයි.

ඔහු අසාර්ථක වීම් ගැන කතා කරන විට, හරීන් ප්‍රනාන්දු සහ මනූෂ නානායක්කාර යන අමාත්‍යවරුන් ඔවුන්ගේ දේශපාලන ලොක්කා අපහසුතාවට පත් නොකර ඔවුන් අතර බෙදා ගන්නා හාස්‍යමය සිනහව මට සිතාගත හැකිය. සාමාන්‍යයෙන් කෙනෙක් බලාපොරොත්තු වෙන්නේ ‘අසාර්ථක වීමක්’ තවත් කෙනෙකුට තමන් කළ වැරදි නිවැරදි කර ගැනීමට මඟ සලසා දීමයි. හරීන් ප්‍රනාන්දු සහ මනූෂ නානායක්කාර යන පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් සභා ගැබේ ජපන් පහන් කූඩු බිම හෙළීමට මෙන් කෑගැසුවේ මෙයයි.

නමුත් මෙහි සිටින්නේ කිසියම් නිවැරදි කිරීමක් පෙළගස්වා ඇති බව ඔප්පු කිරීමට නිශ්චිත නිවැරදි කිරීමේ ක්‍රියාමාර්ගයක් පෙන්වීමේ බලාපොරොත්තුවේ කිරණක් හෝ කිසිදු සලකුණක් නොමැති ජනාධිපතිවරයෙකි. ඔහුගේ එකම ඉල්ලීම වන්නේ මාස දෙකක කාලයක් තම ලේකම් කාර්යාලයට ඇතුළුවීම තහනම් කිරීමෙන් පවා අතිශයින් තනුක වුවද, ඔහුගේ තේජස අල්ලාගෙන ඔහුගේ ‘උසස් බව’ සහ ‘ශ්‍රේෂ්ඨත්වය’ පෙන්වීමට ඉඩ දීමයි.

අපගේ වල් සිහින තුළ සත්‍ය වශයෙන්ම නොපවතින ජනවරමක් (මිලියන 6.9) ගැන ඔහු අපට මතක් කර දෙන විට කෙනෙකුට ඔහුට අනුකම්පා කළ හැකිය. එහෙම ජනවරමක් දැන් වලංගුයි කියලා කවුරුත් කියන්නේ නැහැ. ගොවීන්, කම්කරුවන්, රාජ්‍ය හෝ පෞද්ගලික අංශයේ සේවකයන්, “ගෝඨා ගෙදර යන්න” යැයි කෑගසන තරුණයින්, වෘත්තිකයන්, විද්වතුන් සහ වෙනත් අයගේ අවබෝධය මෙයයි. නමුත් ඔහුට එය නොඇසෙන අතර ගැටුමේ මතකයන් මත ජීවත් වන අතර ඔහුට පිටුපසින් ඔප්පු කළ නොහැකි මිලියන 6.9 කි.

මා දුටු ඔහුගේ මාධ්‍ය හමුව පිළිබඳ වාර්තා (එනම්, ව්‍යාපාරික ප්‍රමිතිය) ප්‍රජාව විශාල වශයෙන් මුහුණ දෙන හදිසි ප්‍රශ්න පිළිබඳව ඔහුගේ උත්සුකතාව පෙන්නුම් කළේ නැත. විනිශ්චය කිරීමට, අපි එක් ප්රදේශයක් දෙස බලමු. එය ළමයින්ට සහ අවදානමට ලක්විය හැකි කණ්ඩායම් සඳහා අත්‍යවශ්‍ය ඖෂධ ගැන ය. නිදසුනක් වශයෙන්, සියලුම ළමා වාට්ටු වල තිබිය යුතු ශාරීරික ආබාධ සඳහා ඖෂධ හෝ මාරාන්තික ජලභීතිකා රෝගයට එරෙහිව එන්නත් රෝහල්වල නොමැත. එයින් අදහස් කරන්නේ ශාරීරික යෝග්‍යතාවයෙන් පෙළෙන දරුවන් මිය යා යුතු අතර, ජලභීතිකා රෝගයට එරෙහි එන්නත සඳහා චෙන්නායි වෙත යාමට රෝගීන්ට හැකියාවක් නොමැති නම් මිය යා යුතු බවයි.

අග්‍රාමාත්‍ය රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා සිය උපරිමයෙන් අර්බුදය විසඳීමට උත්සාහ කරන අතර ජනාධිපතිවරයා ව්‍යාපාරිකයෙකු වන ධම්මික පෙරේරා සමඟ අගමැතිවරයාට මුක්කු ගසන්නේ මහ මොළකරු බැසිල් රාජපක්ෂ ආණ්ඩුවෙන් සහ පාර්ලිමේන්තුවෙන් ඉවත්වීමේ පසුබිම තුළය. ධම්මික පෙරේරාට රාජපක්ෂ සහෝදරයන්ගේ පච්ච කෙටූ අසාර්ථකත්වයන් හොඳින් ජයගත හැකිද යන්න ඇගයීමට ලක් වනු ඇත.

මෙම අසාර්ථකත්වයන් දේශීය වශයෙන් පමණක් නොව ජාත්‍යන්තර වශයෙන් හඳුනාගෙන ඇත. 2022 ජූනි 10 වැනි දින එක්සත් ජනපද සෙනෙට් විදේශ සබඳතා කමිටුවේ සභාපති සෙනෙට් සභික බොබ් මෙනෙන්ඩෙස් ප්‍රකාශ කළ දේ උපුටා දැක්වීමට මට ඉඩ දෙන්න, “රාජපක්ෂවරුන් යටතේ ශ්‍රී ලංකාව මූල්‍ය විනාශයේ සහ මානුෂීය ව්‍යසනයක අද්දර තබා ඇත. මහින්ද රාජපක්‍ෂ තම රට කෙළින්ම චීන ණය උගුලකට ගෙන ගිය අතර පසුව ඔහුගේ සොහොයුරු ගෝඨාභය රාජපක්‍ෂ එහි ස්වෛරී ණය පැහැර හැරීම වළක්වා ගැනීමට අවශ්‍ය දූරදර්ශී ආර්ථික පියවර ගැනීමට අපොහොසත් විය. වෙනසකට කාලය පැමිණ ඇති බව පැහැදිලි කිරීමට අද සෑම තරාතිරමකම ශ්‍රී ලාංකිකයන් නැගී සිටිනවා.” රාජපක්ෂ සහෝදරයන් නතර කිරීමට, නිෂ්ප්‍රභා කිරීමට උත්සාහ කරන වෙනස මෙයයි! මෙම උපුටා දැක්වීමෙන් කවුරුන් හෝ එක්සත් ජනපදයට මුක්කු ගසන බව නොකියන්න, මන්ද මෙය QUAD හි ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට මානුෂීය ආධාර සැපයීම සඳහා ඉන්දියාවේ සහ ජපානයේ ධනාත්මක පියවර ඉස්මතු කිරීමට ප්‍රතිචාරයක් වූ බැවිනි.

එවැනි තත්ත්වයන් යටතේ, ඔහු සිය සම්පූර්ණ ධූර කාලය ගෙවී යන්නේ අමතර අසාර්ථකත්වයන් සමඟ නම්, උග්‍ර ආර්ථික පරිහානියට, දේශපාලන අවිනිශ්චිතතාවයට, සමාජ නොසන්සුන්තාවයට සහ ව්‍යවස්ථා ප්‍රතිසංස්කරණ දියාරු කිරීමට සහ සැඟවීමට ඔහු දායක වනු ඇත. එවැනි අවස්ථාවකදී ඔහු 20A නොවෙනස්ව සිටීම වඩාත් කැමති වන්නේ එය ඔහුට ඵලදායී, ආරක්ෂිත සහ ප්‍රයෝජනවත් ව්‍යවස්ථාපිත ප්‍රතිකාරයක් වනු ඇති බැවිනි. කෙසේ වෙතත්, එය පිලිපීනයේ බොංබොං මාකෝස් අනුපිටපත් කරමින් අග්‍රස්ථානයට පැමිණීමට නාමල් රාජපක්ෂ විසින් කරන ලද මහා අභිප්‍රායන් සහ සැලසුම් නිසැකවම බොඳ කර ප්‍රමාද කරනු ඇත.

ජනාධිපතිවරයා පැවසුවේ “මොකක්ද මේ විධායක ජනාධිපති බලතල? මගේ අදහස නම් ඔබට ජනාධිපති ධුරයක් තිබේ නම් ඔහුට සම්පූර්ණ බලතල තිබිය යුතු බවයි. නැතිනම් විධායක ජනාධිපති ක්‍රමය අහෝසි කර සම්පූර්ණ වෙස්ට්මිනිස්ටර් පන්නයේ පාර්ලිමේන්තුවකට යන්න.” එබැවින් ඔහු "සැලසුම් සහගත ව්‍යවස්ථා සංශෝධනයක සාර්ථකත්වය ගැන සැකයෙන්" සිටීම පුදුමයක් නොවේ. පසුගිය වසර දෙකහමාර විධායක ජනාධිපති ක්‍රමය ජනතාවගේ යහපත සඳහා විධායක ජනාධිපති ක්‍රමයකට සමාන නොවූ අතර ඔහුගේ විකල්ප විකල්පය (එනම් වෙස්ට්මිනිස්ටර් විලාසය) ඔහු විසින්ද අනුගමනය නොකෙරේ.

“එක්කෝ ජනාධිපති ක්‍රමය අහෝසි කළ යුතුයි, නැතිනම් පාර්ලිමේන්තුව පාලනයෙන් ඈත් කළ යුතුයි” යනුවෙන් ඔහුගේ ප්‍රකාශය. පවතින ව්‍යවස්ථාපිත ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදී පාලනය කෙරෙහි ඔහුගේ දැනුම, අවබෝධය, නිරාවරණය සහ ආකල්පය පෙන්නුම් කරයි. ඔහු තවදුරටත් පැවසුවේ, “මම මෙය අත්විඳිමි සහ දැන්. දන්නවා." ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදය වැනි සියවස් ගණනක් පැරණි සංකල්ප ගැන සංසන්දනාත්මකව අදහස් දැක්වීමට වසර දෙකක පළපුරුද්දක මොනතරම් ප්‍රීතිමත් කාලයක්ද! මෙම ප්‍රකාශය සම්බන්ධයෙන් මිනිසුන් ඔහුට දොස් පැවරිය හැකි යැයි ඔහු සැක කළේය. ඔහු හරි. මිනිසුන් පමණක් දොස් පවරන්නේ නම්, වෙනත් කිසිවක් නොකරන්නේ නම්, ඔහු අතිශයින්ම සතුටු විය යුතුය, වාසනාවන්ත විය යුතුය.

ආරක්ෂක ලේකම්වරයා ලෙස සුපුරුදු අතීත කාර්ය සාධනය වන්නේ ඔහු සහ ඔහුගේ ආධාරකරුවන් සැමවිටම රැව්දෙන හැෂ් ටැගයයි. සාර්ථක ආරක්ෂක පරිපාලකයෙකු හෝ නාගරික සංවර්ධකයෙකු වීම පුද්ගලයෙකු රාජ්‍ය නායකයෙකු වීමට වඩා සුදුසු යැයි ඔවුන්ගේ සංකල්පය පසුගිය වසර දෙකේ දී ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කර ඇත. වැඩ කරන පීටර්ගේ මූලධර්මය. එබැවින් කාර්ය සාධනය ඉහළ නැංවීම සඳහා එය සඳහන් කිරීම පවා ප්‍රීතිමත් හාස්‍යයක් බවට පත්වේ.

මාධ්‍ය පැවසුවේ, “බෝග නිෂ්පාදනය පහත වැටීමට හේතු වූ රසායනික පොහොර තහනම් කිරීමේ කෙටි කාලීන පියවරක් වන “ස්වාභාවික කෘෂිකර්මාන්තය” හරහා තල්ලු කිරීමේ ඔහුගේ මතභේදාත්මක ඉලක්කය ජනාධිපතිවරයා නැවත අවධාරණය කළේය. අසාර්ථක වීම් නොතකා එය නොතකා ඉදිරියට ගෙන යා යුතු බව පැවසුවහොත් එයම වරදක් වනු ඇත.

විශේෂයෙන්ම එළැඹෙන යල කන්නය සඳහා යූරියා පොහොර ඉන්දියාවෙන් ලබා ගැනීම සඳහා ඇමෙරිකානු ඩොලර් මිලියන 55ක ණය මාර්ගයක් සමඟින් ඉන්දියානුවන් අපේ ගොවීන් මුදා ගැනීමත් සමඟ එසේ නොවේවායි බලාපොරොත්තු වෙනවා. අග්‍රාමාත්‍ය රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ, කෘෂිකර්ම අමාත්‍ය මහින්ද අමරවීර, මුදල් ලේකම් මහින්ද සෙනෙවිරත්න, ඉන්දීය මහ කොමසාරිස් ගෝපාල් බග්ලේ, අග්‍රාමාත්‍ය කාර්ය මණ්ඩල ප්‍රධානී සාගල රත්නායක, උපදේශක ආචාර්ය ආර්.එච්.එස් සමරතුංග ඇතුළු පිරිසක් මෙම අවස්ථාවට එක්ව සිටීමෙන් මෙම ඉතුරුම් කරුණාවේ උදාරතම වැදගත්කම නිරීක්ෂණය විය. ගිවිසුම අත්සන් කිරීමේදී.

විදේශ ලේකම් කාර්යාලයේ සිටින මිත්‍ර රාජ්‍ය තාන්ත්‍රික අරුණි විජේවර්ධන මහත්මිය සමඟ ප්‍රකාශ කළ පරිදි විදේශ ප්‍රධානීන් සමඟ ද්විපාර්ශ්වික සාකච්ඡා සාර්ථක වේවායි අපි ජනාධිපතිතුමාට ප්‍රාර්ථනා කරමු. නිසැකවම, ඔහු ජාත්‍යන්තර මූල්‍ය අරමුදලේ ප්‍රධානියා සහ නිලධාරීන්, ලෝක බැංකුව, USAID හි සමන්තා පවර්, අගමැති නරේන්ද්‍ර මෝදි සහ වෙනත් අයගේ ප්‍රකාශ කියවා ඔවුන් ආකර්ෂණය කර ගැනීමට අවශ්‍ය දේ, විශේෂයෙන් ‘දේශපාලන ස්ථාවරත්වය’ පිළිබඳව ඔහුව දැනුවත් කරනු ඇත.

තවද, ආර්ථික සහ දේශපාලන පෙරමුණු සඳහා ස්ථාවරත්වය අවශ්‍ය වන්නේ, පොහොට්ටුව මහලේකම් හෝ ඔහුගේ ඇතැම් පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් විශ්වාස කරන පරිදි නොවේ. දේශපාලන ස්ථාවරත්වය රඳා පවතින්නේ බැසිල් රාජපක්ෂට බලපාන පුරවැසි ප්‍රශ්නය හේතුවෙන් ඔහු සහ ඔහුගේ පක්ෂය සුවිසල් දායකත්වයක් ලබා දිය යුතු ව්‍යවස්ථාමය ප්‍රතිසංස්කරණ මත ය. කෙසේ වෙතත්, දැන් බැසිල් රාජපක්ෂ සමීකරණයෙන් ඉවත් වීමත් සමඟ ඔහුට එල්ල වන දැඩි පීඩනය අඩු වනු ඇත.

එබැවින් ඔහු බාහිර වර්ධනයන් බැරෑරුම් ලෙස නිරීක්ෂණය කළ යුතු අතර අගමැති වික්‍රමසිංහගේ සහාය ඇතිව ආරක්ෂිත සහ පහසු පිටවීමේ මාර්ගයක් සොයාගත යුතුය. වසර දෙකකට පසුව ආපසු ගෙදර යාමට සැලසුම් කිරීම, “ගෝඨා දැන් ගෙදර යන්න!” යනුවෙන් සදාකාලිකව කෑගසන ගෝටා ගෝ ගම විරෝධතාකරුවන්ගේ බලාපොරොත්තු සුන් කරයි.

අවසාන වශයෙන්, ජනාධිපති ලෙස ඔහුගේ වෘත්තීය ජීවිතය ඇගයීම නව ඉගෙනුම් අත්දැකීමක් විවෘත කරයි. දිගුකාලීන දේශපාලකයන් විසින් ගෙන යන ගමන් මලු ගැන ඔහුගේ තර්කය නිවැරදිය. කෙටි කාලීන දේශපාලනඥයෙකු වූ ඔහු හමුදා, ව්‍යාපාරික ලෝකයේ මිතුරන්, දේශපාලන උපදේශකයින්, නිදහස් වූ වැරදිකරුවන් සහ වියත් මග සහ එළිය වැනි කණ්ඩායම්වල ගමන් මලු රැගෙන යන අයුරු ද දැක තිබේ. ඔවුන්ගේ දුර්වල සහයෝගය ඔහුව ශක්තිමත් නොකළ නමුත් ඔහුගේ කාර්යය අවුල් කළේය.

එවැනි ආයතනවලින් සහ ‘බෑග්’වලින් ඔහු තෝරා ගත් කිහිපයක් ඔහු හැර ගොස් ඇත, අලුත්ම පුද්ගලයා වූයේ සති කිහිපයක් පමණක් සේවය කළ ලිට්‍රෝ සභාපති විජිත හේරත් ය. හරි අවාසනාවන්තයි. බලාපොරොත්තුවක් ඇති කරමින් සමන් ඒකනායක, ආචාර්ය ආර්.එච්.එස්. සමරතුංග, ආර්. පාස්කරලිංගම් සහ තවත් අය අගමැති කණ්ඩායමට පැමිණීමත් සමඟ ඔහුට ‘මලුවලින්’ විශිෂ්ට ද්‍රව්‍ය තෝරා ගන්නා ආකාරය සහ විශ්වාසවන්තව සිටින ආකාරය අගමැති වික්‍රමසිංහගෙන් පිටුවක් ඉගෙන ගත හැකිය.

ජනාධිපතිවරයා පවසා ඇත්තේ, “ජනාධිපතිවරයාගේ මේ විධායක (බලතල) මොනවාද? මගේ අදහස නම් ඔබට ජනාධිපති ධුරයක් තිබේ නම් ඔහුට සම්පූර්ණ බලතල තිබිය යුතු බවයි. නැතිනම් විධායක ජනාධිපති ක්‍රමය අහෝසි කර සම්පූර්ණ වෙස්ට්මිනිස්ටර් පන්නයේ පාර්ලිමේන්තුවකට යන්න.” ඔහු අපේක්ෂා කරන පෙරළිය සමාජ ඉල්ලුම ද වේ. බොහෝ දෙනෙක් ඔහු සමඟ එකඟ වන නමුත් නීතිමය බාධා නොතකා වහාම ආපසු නිවසට පැමිණෙන ලෙස ඉල්ලා සිටිති. සරලව කිවහොත්, ඔහු පාලනය පිළිබඳ මීළඟ 'වාර පරීක්ෂණය' "පාස් වන" තෙක් මිනිසුන්ට බලා සිටිය නොහැක.

තම පාලනය තමන් සහ රට අසාර්ථක කර ඇති බවට ජනාධිපතිවරයා එකඟ නොවිය හැකි නමුත් විරෝධතාකරුවන් ඉල්ලා සිටින්නේ "ඔබේ සුවපහසු කලාපයෙන් ඉවත් වී අන් අයට සහනයක් ලබා දෙන්න" යනුවෙනි. එහෙම කෑගහන අය මේ මාධ්‍ය වාර්තාව දැකලා කම්පා වෙනවා ඇති. කෑගැසීම ප්‍රතිරාවය කළ හැකි අතර වඩාත් තීව්‍ර, උග්‍ර සහ භයානක ක්‍රියා විකාශනය කළ හැකිය. යාච්ඤා කරන්න, එය කෑගැසීමේ පවතිනවා මිස, ලේ වැගිරෙන රුදුරුකමෙන් සහ දුෂ්ටත්වයෙන් ලෝකය වෙනත් තැනක අත්විඳ ඇති දේ නොවේ. එසේ වුවද, දේශපාලකයන් විසින් ආර්ථික හා දේශපාලන ප්‍රශ්නවලට නිසි, කාලෝචිත, කාර්යක්‍ෂම සහ ඵලදායි ලෙස ආමන්ත්‍රණය නොකරන්නේ නම්, පවතින ආර්ථික තත්ත්වය භයානක විපත් දක්වා ව්‍යාප්ත වීමට මෙවැනි කෑගැසීම් අවුස්සනු ඇත. මෙවැනි ව්‍යසනයක් ගැන සියලු දේශපාලකයින් කල්පනාකාරී වේවා, එවැන්නකට පොහොර නොයෙදේවා.

ta.title: ஜனாதிபதி ராஜபக்ஷ "கோதா வீட்டிற்குச் செல்லுங்கள்" என்ற ஒலியைக் கேட்கவில்லை, மாறாக மோதலின் நினைவுகள் மற்றும் அவருக்குப் பின்னால் உள்ள நிரூபிக்க முடியாத 6.9 மில்லியன் மக்கள் வாழ்கிறார்.
body_lines: உண்மையின் பெரிய எதிரி பெரும்பாலும் பொய், வேண்டுமென்றே, இட்டுக்கட்டப்பட்ட மற்றும் நேர்மையற்றது அல்ல, ஆனால் கட்டுக்கதை, விடாமுயற்சி, வற்புறுத்தல் மற்றும் நம்பத்தகாதது.

ஒரு இலகுவான முறையில், ஜனாதிபதி கென்னடியின் மேற்கோள் 2022 இல் இலங்கையில் என்ன நடக்கப் போகிறது என்பது பற்றிய முன்னறிவிப்பால் ஓரளவு உந்துதல் பெற்றிருக்கும் என்று நான் மகிழ்ச்சியடைகிறேன்! ஜனாதிபதி கோட்டாபய ராஜபக்ச "தன் பதவிக்காலத்தில் எஞ்சிய இரண்டு வருடங்களை முடிப்பேன்" என்று சபதம் செய்யும் போது, ​​அவரை பதவி நீக்கம் செய்ய வேண்டும் என்று பல மாதங்களாக தெரு ஆர்ப்பாட்டங்கள் நடந்தாலும், வேறு என்ன யூகிக்க முடியும். உண்மைதான், அனைத்து ஆடம்பரமும் பெருமையும் கொண்ட எந்த ஜனாதிபதியும் தெருப் போராட்டங்களால் மட்டுமே ஆறுதல் மண்டலத்தை விட்டு வெளியேற மாட்டார்கள்.

ஆயினும், ஜனாதிபதி ராஜபக்ஷ மீண்டும் போட்டியிடப் போவதில்லை என்று அறிவித்தது யதார்த்தமானது. இதற்குக் காரணம் தெருமுனைப் போராட்டங்கள் மட்டுமல்ல, இலங்கையின் மூலை முடுக்கெல்லாம் கேட்கப்பட்ட, கேட்காத எதிர்ப்புகள், சாபங்கள், புகார்கள். இப்படி எதிரொலித்து யாரும் பேரம் பேசி வெற்றி பெற மாட்டார்கள். அவர் போட்டியிடுவார் என்று யாராவது சொன்னால், அது ஒரு கட்டுக்கதையாக மாறும், ஜனாதிபதி கென்னடி கூறியது போல் - ஒரு பொய், வேண்டுமென்றே, திட்டமிட்டு, நேர்மையற்றது. நிச்சயமாக, பொஹொட்டுவவைச் சேர்ந்த எவரும் அவர் போட்டியிடுவார் என்று எதிர்பார்க்கவில்லை, ஏனென்றால் ஆகஸ்ட் 2019 இல் ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் போட்டியாளர்கள் அனுபவித்தது போன்ற விளைவுகளை அவர்களும் சந்திக்க நேரிடும்!

அவரும் அவரது ஆதரவாளர்களும் கூறும் ஆணை மற்றும் புகழ் அவருக்கும் பொஹொட்டுவ அரசாங்கத்துக்கும் உள்ளதா என்பதை அவர் போட்டியிடும் நாளிலோ அல்லது நீண்டகாலமாக தாமதமாகி வரும் மாகாண சபைத் தேர்தலில் முன்கூட்டியே ஒப்புதல் பெற விரும்பினாலும் எளிதாகச் சரிபார்க்க முடியும். மறுதேர்தலை நாடவில்லை என ஜனாதிபதியின் முன்னரே அறிவித்தல், அவர் உடனடியாக வெளியேற விரும்பவில்லை என்றாலும், உண்மையான பிரபலம் குறித்த அவரது நம்பிக்கையை காட்டுகிறது.

"நிதிச் சிக்கலைச் சரிசெய்வதில்" கவனம் செலுத்த விரும்புவதால், அவர் மீண்டும் தேர்தலில் நிற்கவில்லை என்றால், அது நல்லது மற்றும் நல்லது, ஆனால் அது நாட்டின் பொருளாதாரக் குழப்பத்தை ஏற்படுத்திய குழுவை வழிநடத்தியதிலிருந்து அவர் செலுத்திய தவம் என்று புரிந்து கொள்ளப்படும். இந்தப் பொறுப்பை ஏற்றுள்ள புதிய பிரதமர் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்கவிற்கு கல்வி கற்பதற்கு ஆய்வாளர்கள் தேவையில்லை.

2019 டிசம்பரில் வரி வருவாயைக் குறைத்து, வரிச் சலுகைகள் மற்றும் மதிப்பு கூட்டப்பட்ட வரி விதிப்பு, நட்பு இறக்குமதியாளர்களுக்கு வரி விலக்கு என கூறப்படும் வரி விலக்கு, ஜனாதிபதியின் கனவின் வேகம் காரணமாக விவசாயம் சரிவு ஆகியவற்றால் பொருளாதார சரிவு தொடங்கியது என்பது அனைவரும் அறிந்ததே. கரிம வேளாண்மை, டாலர் பற்றாக்குறை காரணமாக உர இறக்குமதி, மின்சாரம் மற்றும் எரிசக்தி விநியோகக் கட்டுப்பாடுகள், சர்வதேச நாணய நிதியத்துடன் தாமதமான நடவடிக்கை மற்றும் கடன் மறுசீரமைப்பு ஆகியவற்றுடன் இணைந்தது, அரசியல் சட்டத் திருத்தக் கையாளுதல்கள் மூலம் குவிக்கப்பட்ட அரசியல் அதிகாரத்தைப் பிடுங்குவதன் ஆதரவு, பொருளாதார மற்றும் அரசியல் சிக்கலில் சிக்கியது. நெருக்கடி கடைசியுடன் தாங்கப்படுகிறது. அணித் தலைவராக, அவர் இந்த தவறுகளால் வேட்டையாடப்படுகிறார்.

இவற்றில் இரண்டை ‘தவறுகள்’ என்று சொல்லி, மிகப் பெரிய தற்கொலைத் தவறுகள் எனத் தெரியாமல், மிக இலகுவாக பொறுப்பை அவர் சாந்தமாக ஏற்றுக்கொண்டார். அடுத்த இரண்டு வருடங்கள் அல்லது அதற்கும் மேலாக, அவர்கள் அவரைத் தலைவராகத் தொடரலாமா, மேலும் அவரது துணிச்சலான முடிவெடுப்பதில் (ஏற்கனவே ஆட்சியில் செய்ததைப் போல) மேலும் துன்பங்களைச் சந்திக்க வேண்டுமா என்று பொதுமக்கள் ஆச்சரியப்படுகிறார்கள். அவரது ஆதரவாளர்கள், "அவருக்கு இன்னொரு வாய்ப்பு கொடுங்கள்!"

"தோல்வியடைந்த ஜனாதிபதியாக என்னால் செல்ல முடியாது," என்று ஜனாதிபதி ராஜபக்ஷ அவர்கள் செய்த தவறுகளுக்காக புலம்புகிறார். அவரது தோல்விகளை அவரும் அமைச்சர் அலி சப்ரியும் கூட ஒப்புக்கொண்டுள்ளனர். அணியின் தலைவராக எஞ்சியவர்களையும் ஏற்றுக்கொள்ள ஜனாதிபதி தைரியமாக இருக்க வேண்டும். ஓய்வு பெற்றாலும் அவர் ராணுவ வீரர்! அதுதான் அதிகாரிகள் மற்றும் மனிதர்களின் வழி.

அவர் தோல்விகளைப் பற்றிப் பேசும்போது, ​​அமைச்சர்களான ஹரின் பெர்னாண்டோ மற்றும் மனுஷ நாணயக்கார ஆகியோர் தங்கள் அரசியல் முதலாளியை வெட்கப்படாமல், நகைச்சுவையாகச் சிரித்துக் கொள்வதை என்னால் கற்பனை செய்து பார்க்க முடிகிறது. சாதாரணமாக ஒருவர், தான் செய்த தவறுகளை இன்னொருவர் திருத்திக் கொள்ள ‘தோல்வியை’ விட்டுவிட வேண்டும் என்று எதிர்பார்க்கிறார். இதையே நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர்களான ஹரீன் பெர்னாண்டோ மற்றும் மனுஷ நாணயக்கார ஆகியோர் சபையில் இருந்த ஜப்பானிய சரவிளக்குகளை கீழே இறக்குவது போல் கத்தினார்கள்.

ஆனால், எந்தத் திருத்தங்களும் வரிசையாகச் செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளன என்பதை நிரூபிப்பதற்காக எந்தவிதமான உறுதியான திருத்தச் செயலையும் காட்டும் நம்பிக்கையின் கதிரோ அல்லது சாயலோ இல்லாத ஒரு ஜனாதிபதி இங்கே இருக்கிறார். இரண்டு மாதங்களுக்கு தனது செயலகத்தில் நுழைய தடை விதிக்கப்பட்டாலும், அவரது பெருமையை நிலைநிறுத்திக் கொள்ளவும், தனது 'மேன்மை' மற்றும் 'மகத்துவத்தை' காட்ட அனுமதிக்க வேண்டும் என்பதே அவரது ஒரே கோரிக்கை.

ஒரு ஆணை (6.9 மில்லியன்) பற்றி அவர் நமக்கு நினைவூட்டும் போது ஒருவர் அவர் மீது அனுதாபம் காட்டலாம், இது நமது கொடூரமான கனவுகளில் உண்மையில் இல்லை. அப்படியொரு ஆணை இப்போது செல்லுபடியாகும் என்று யாரும் சொல்ல மாட்டார்கள். விவசாயிகள், தொழிலாளர்கள், பொது அல்லது தனியார் துறை ஊழியர்கள், "கோட்டா கோ ஹோம்" என்று கூக்குரலிடும் இளைஞர்கள், தொழில் வல்லுநர்கள், கல்வியாளர்கள் மற்றும் பலர் புரிந்துகொள்வது இதுதான். ஆனால் அவர் அதைக் கேட்கவில்லை மற்றும் அவருக்குப் பின்னால் உள்ள மோதல் மற்றும் நிரூபிக்க முடியாத 6.9 மில்லியன் நினைவுகளில் வாழ்கிறார்.

நான் பார்த்த அவரது செய்தியாளர் சந்திப்பின் அறிக்கைகள் (அதாவது, பிசினஸ் ஸ்டாண்டர்ட்) சமூகம் பொதுவாக எதிர்கொள்ளும் மிக அவசரமான பிரச்சினைகள் குறித்த அவரது கவலைகளைக் காட்டவில்லை. தீர்ப்பதற்கு, ஒரு பகுதியைப் பார்ப்போம். இது குழந்தைகள் மற்றும் பாதிக்கப்படக்கூடிய குழுக்களுக்கான அத்தியாவசிய மருந்து பற்றியது. உதாரணமாக, அனைத்து குழந்தைகள் வார்டுகளிலும் இருக்க வேண்டிய ஃபிட்ஸிற்கான மருந்து அல்லது ஆபத்தான வெறிநாய்க்கடிக்கு எதிரான தடுப்பூசி மருத்துவமனைகளில் இல்லை. அதாவது ஃபிட்ஸ் நோயால் பாதிக்கப்பட்ட குழந்தைகள் இறக்க வேண்டும், மேலும் ரேபிஸ் தடுப்பூசி போடுவதற்கு நோயாளிகள் சென்னை செல்ல முடியாவிட்டால் இறக்க வேண்டும்.

பிரதமர் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க தனது முழு பலத்துடன் நெருக்கடியைத் தீர்க்க முயற்சி செய்கிறார், மேலும் தலைமறைவான பசில் ராஜபக்ஷ அரசாங்கத்தையும் பாராளுமன்றத்தையும் விட்டு வெளியேறிய பின்னணியில், வர்த்தக அதிபரான தம்மிக்க பெரேராவுடன் ஜனாதிபதி பிரதமருக்கு முட்டுக் கொடுத்தார். ராஜபக்ச உடன்பிறப்புகளின் தோல்விகளை தம்மிக்க பெரேரா சிறப்பாகவும், உண்மையாகவும் பச்சை குத்தியாரா என்பதை மதிப்பிடுவது சுவாரஸ்யமாக இருக்கும்.

இந்தத் தோல்விகள் உள்நாட்டில் மட்டுமல்ல, சர்வதேச ரீதியாகவும் அடையாளம் காணப்படுகின்றன. ஜூன் 10, 2022 அன்று அமெரிக்க செனட்டின் வெளியுறவுக் குழுவின் தலைவரான செனட்டர் பாப் மெனெண்டஸ் கூறியதை மேற்கோள் காட்டுகிறேன், அவர் “ராஜபக்ஷக்களின் கீழ், இலங்கை நிதி அழிவு மற்றும் மனிதாபிமான பேரழிவின் விளிம்பில் விடப்பட்டுள்ளது. மகிந்த ராஜபக்ச தனது நாட்டை நேரடியாக சீனக் கடன் பொறிக்குள் இட்டுச் சென்றார், பின்னர் அவரது சகோதரரான கோட்டாபய ராஜபக்ச, அதன் இறையாண்மைக் கடனைத் திருப்பிச் செலுத்துவதைத் தவிர்ப்பதற்குத் தேவையான விவேகமான பொருளாதார நடவடிக்கைகளை எடுக்கத் தவறிவிட்டார். இன்று, அனைத்துப் பின்னணியில் உள்ள இலங்கையர்களும், இது ஒரு மாற்றத்திற்கான நேரம் என்பதை தெளிவுபடுத்தும் வகையில் எழுச்சி பெற்று வருகின்றனர். இதுவே ராஜபக்ச உடன்பிறப்புகளின் முயற்சியை தடுத்து நிறுத்தும் மாற்றமாகும்! இந்த மேற்கோள் மூலம் யாரோ அமெரிக்காவிற்கு முட்டுக்கட்டை போடுகிறார்கள் என்று சொல்லாதீர்கள், ஏனெனில் இது QUAD இல் இலங்கைக்கு மனிதாபிமான உதவிகளை வழங்குவதில் இந்தியா மற்றும் ஜப்பானின் நேர்மறையான நடவடிக்கைகளை எடுத்துக்காட்டுவதற்கான பதில்.

அத்தகைய சூழ்நிலையில், அவர் தனது முழு காலத்தையும் கூடுதல் தோல்விகளுடன் நடத்தினால், அவர் உயர்ந்த பொருளாதார வீழ்ச்சி, அரசியல் நிச்சயமற்ற தன்மை, சமூக அமைதியின்மை மற்றும் அரசியலமைப்பு சீர்திருத்தத்தை நீர்த்துப்போகச் செய்து மறைப்பதில் பங்களிப்பார். அத்தகைய நிகழ்வில், அவர் 20A ஐ அப்படியே வைத்திருப்பார், ஏனெனில் அது அவருக்கு பயனுள்ள, பாதுகாப்பான மற்றும் பயனுள்ள அரசியலமைப்பு சிகிச்சையாக இருக்கும். எவ்வாறாயினும், பிலிப்பைன்ஸின் பொங்போங் மார்கோஸை நகலெடுத்து உச்சத்தை அடைவதற்காக நாமல் ராஜபக்ச செய்த பெரிய நோக்கங்களையும் திட்டங்களையும் இது நிச்சயமாக மங்கலாக்கும் மற்றும் தாமதப்படுத்தும்.

ஜனாதிபதி கூறினார்: “ஜனாதிபதியின் இந்த நிறைவேற்று (அதிகாரங்கள்) என்ன? உங்களுக்கு ஜனாதிபதி பதவி இருந்தால் அவருக்கு முழு அதிகாரமும் இருக்க வேண்டும் என்பதே எனது கருத்து. இல்லையேல் நிறைவேற்று அதிகாரம் கொண்ட ஜனாதிபதி முறைமையை ஒழித்துவிட்டு முழுமையான வெஸ்ட்மின்ஸ்டர் பாணி பாராளுமன்றத்திற்கு செல்லுங்கள்” என்றார். எனவே, அவர் "திட்டமிட்ட அரசியலமைப்புத் திருத்தத்தின் வெற்றி குறித்து சந்தேகம்" கொண்டிருப்பதில் ஆச்சரியமில்லை. கடந்த இரண்டரை ஆண்டுகால நிறைவேற்று அதிகாரம் கொண்ட ஜனாதிபதி முறை மக்களின் நலனுக்காக எந்த நிறைவேற்று அதிகாரம் கொண்ட ஜனாதிபதி பதவிக்கு சமமானதாக இல்லை, மேலும் அவரது மாற்று விருப்பம் (அதாவது வெஸ்ட்மின்ஸ்டர் பாணி) அவராலும் பின்பற்றப்படவில்லை.

"ஒன்று ஜனாதிபதி பதவியை ஒழிக்க வேண்டும், அல்லது பாராளுமன்றம் ஆட்சியில் இருந்து விலக்கி வைக்கப்பட வேண்டும்" என்று அவர் கூறியிருந்தார். அவரது அறிவு, புரிதல், வெளிப்பாடு மற்றும் தற்போதைய அரசியலமைப்பு ஜனநாயக ஆளுகை மீதான அணுகுமுறை ஆகியவற்றைக் காட்டுகிறது. அவர் மேலும் கூறுகையில், “இதை நான் இப்போது அனுபவித்தேன். தெரியும்." ஜனநாயகம் போன்ற பல நூற்றாண்டுகள் பழமையான கருத்துக்களுக்கு ஒப்பீட்டளவில் கருத்துரைக்க இரண்டு வருட அனுபவத்தின் மகிழ்ச்சியான காலம்! இந்த பேச்சுக்காக மக்கள் தன்னைக் குறை கூறக்கூடும் என்று அவர் சந்தேகித்தார். அவர் சொல்வது சரிதான். மக்கள் குற்றம் சாட்டினால், வேறு எதையும் செய்யாமல், அவர் மிகவும் மகிழ்ச்சியாக இருக்க வேண்டும், அதிர்ஷ்டசாலியாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.

பாதுகாப்புச் செயலாளராக கடந்த காலத்தின் வழக்கமான செயல்பாடு அவரும் அவரது ஆதரவாளர்களும் எப்போதும் அலைமோதும் ஹேஷ்டேக். ஒரு வெற்றிகரமான பாதுகாப்பு நிர்வாகி அல்லது நகர்ப்புற மேம்பாட்டாளராக இருப்பது ஒரு நபரை ஒரு மாநிலத்தின் தலைவராக அதிக தகுதி பெறுகிறது என்ற அவர்களின் கருத்து கடந்த இரண்டு ஆண்டுகளில் நிராகரிக்கப்பட்டது. வேலையில் பீட்டரின் கொள்கை. எனவே, செயல்திறனை அதிகரிக்க அதைக் குறிப்பிடுவது கூட உற்சாகமான நகைச்சுவையாக மாறும்.

"இயற்கை விவசாயம்", பயிர் விளைச்சல் வீழ்ச்சியை ஏற்படுத்திய இரசாயன உரங்களை தடை செய்வதற்கான குறுகிய கால நடவடிக்கையின் மூலம் தனது சர்ச்சைக்குரிய இலக்கை ஜனாதிபதி மீண்டும் வலியுறுத்தினார். தோல்விகளைப் பொருட்படுத்தாமல், அதைப் பொருட்படுத்தாமல் தொடர வேண்டும் என்று சொன்னால், அது ஒரு தவறு.

குறிப்பாக, இந்தியாவிடமிருந்து வரவிருக்கும் யாலா பருவத்திற்கான யூரியா உரத்தை கொள்முதல் செய்வதற்காக 55 மில்லியன் அமெரிக்க டாலர்கள் கடனுடன் இந்தியர்கள் நமது விவசாயிகளை மீட்டெடுப்பார்கள் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிரதமர் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க, விவசாய அமைச்சர் மஹிந்த அமரவீர, நிதிச் செயலாளர் மஹிந்த செனவிரத்ன, இந்திய உயர்ஸ்தானிகர் கோபால் பாக்லே மற்றும் பிரதமரின் தலைமை அதிகாரி சாகல ரத்நாயக்க, ஆலோசகர் கலாநிதி ஆர்.எச்.எஸ்.சமரதுங்க மற்றும் பலர் கலந்துகொண்டதன் மூலம் இந்த சேமிப்புக் கருணையின் மகத்தான முக்கியத்துவம் அவதானிக்கப்பட்டது. ஒப்பந்தத்தில் கையெழுத்திடும் போது.

வெளிவிவகாரச் செயலகத்தில் உள்ள இணக்கமான இராஜதந்திரி அருணி விஜேவர்தனவுடன் குறிப்பிட்டுள்ளபடி வெளிநாட்டுத் தலைவர்களுடனான இருதரப்பு பேச்சுவார்த்தைகளில் ஜனாதிபதி வெற்றிபெற வாழ்த்துகின்றோம். நிச்சயமாக, அவர் சர்வதேச நாணய நிதியத்தின் தலைவர் மற்றும் அதிகாரிகள், உலக வங்கி, USAID இன் சமந்தா பவர், பிரதமர் நரேந்திர மோடி மற்றும் பலர் ஆகியோரின் அறிக்கைகளைப் படித்து, அவர்களை ஈர்க்க என்ன தேவை, குறிப்பாக ‘அரசியல் ஸ்திரத்தன்மை’ குறித்து அவருக்குக் கற்பித்திருப்பார்.

மேலும், பொருளாதார மற்றும் அரசியல் முன்னணிகளுக்கு ஸ்திரத்தன்மை அவசியமானதே தவிர, பொஹொட்டுவ பொதுச் செயலாளர் அல்லது அவரது சில பாராளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர்கள் நம்புவது போன்று அல்ல. அரசியல் ஸ்திரத்தன்மை அரசியலமைப்பு சீர்திருத்தங்களில் தங்கியிருக்கும், அவரும் அவரது கட்சியும் தாராளமாக பங்களிக்க வேண்டும், ஆனால் பசில் ராஜபக்ஷவை பாதிக்கும் குடியுரிமை பிரச்சினை காரணமாக அது வரவில்லை. எவ்வாறாயினும், பசில் ராஜபக்ச சமன்பாட்டிலிருந்து வெளியேறியதால், அவர் மீதான கடுமையான அழுத்தங்கள் குறைக்கப்படும்.

எனவே, அவர் வெளிப்புற அபிவிருத்திகளை தீவிரமாக அவதானித்து, பிரதமர் விக்ரமசிங்கவின் உதவியுடன் பாதுகாப்பான மற்றும் வசதியான வெளியேறும் வழியைக் கண்டறிய வேண்டும். இரண்டு ஆண்டுகளுக்குப் பிறகு வீடு திரும்பத் திட்டமிடுவது, “இப்போது வீட்டுக்குப் போ!” என்று நித்தியமாக கூக்குரலிடும் கோட்டா கோ காமா எதிர்ப்பாளர்களின் நம்பிக்கையைத் தகர்க்கிறது.

இறுதியாக, ஜனாதிபதியாக அவரது வாழ்க்கையின் மதிப்பீடு ஒரு புதிய கற்றல் அனுபவத்தைத் திறக்கிறது. நீண்ட கால அரசியல் வாதிகள் சுமந்து செல்லும் சாமான்கள் பற்றிய அவரது வாதம் சரியே. ஒரு குறுகிய கால அரசியல்வாதியாக இருந்த அவர், இராணுவம், வர்த்தக உலகில் உள்ள தனது நண்பர்கள், அரசியல் ஆலோசகர்கள், விடுவிக்கப்பட்ட குற்றவாளிகள் மற்றும் வியத் மக மற்றும் எலியா போன்ற குழுக்களின் சாமான்களை எடுத்துச் செல்வதையும் கண்டதாகக் கூறப்படுகிறது. அவர்களின் பலவீனமான ஆதரவு அவரை பலப்படுத்தவில்லை, ஆனால் அவரது வேலையை குழப்பியது.

அத்தகைய நிறுவனங்களில் இருந்து அவரது பல தேர்வுகள் மற்றும் 'பேக்கேஜ்' அவரை கைவிட்டது, சமீபத்தியது லிட்ரோவின் தலைவர் விஜித ஹேரத் சில வாரங்கள் மட்டுமே பணியாற்றினார். மிகவும் துரதிர்ஷ்டவசமானது. சமன் ஏக்கநாயக்க, கலாநிதி ஆர்.எச்.எஸ். சமரதுங்க, ஆர்.பாஸ்கரலிங்கம் மற்றும் பலர் பிரதமரின் குழுவுக்குத் திரும்பியதன் மூலம், நம்பிக்கையை உருவாக்கி, ‘பேக்கேஜில்’ இருந்து சிறந்த பொருட்களை எவ்வாறு எடுப்பது என்பதையும், விசுவாசமாக இருப்பதையும் அவர் பிரதமர் விக்கிரமசிங்கவிடமிருந்து ஒரு பக்கத்தைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ள முடியும்.

ஜனாதிபதி கூறினார்: “ஜனாதிபதியின் இந்த நிறைவேற்று (அதிகாரங்கள்) என்ன? உங்களுக்கு ஜனாதிபதி பதவி இருந்தால் அவருக்கு முழு அதிகாரமும் இருக்க வேண்டும் என்பதே எனது கருத்து. இல்லையேல் நிறைவேற்று அதிகாரம் கொண்ட ஜனாதிபதி முறைமையை ஒழித்துவிட்டு முழுமையான வெஸ்ட்மின்ஸ்டர் பாணி பாராளுமன்றத்திற்கு செல்லுங்கள்” என்றார். அவர் எதிர்பார்க்கும் திருப்பம் சமூகத் தேவையும் கூட. பலர் அவருடன் உடன்படுகிறார்கள், ஆனால் சட்டக் கட்டுப்பாடுகளைப் பொருட்படுத்தாமல் அவர் உடனடியாக வீடு திரும்ப வேண்டும் என்று கோருகின்றனர். எளிமையாகச் சொன்னால், ஆட்சிக்கான அடுத்த ‘டெர்ம் டெஸ்டில்’ அவர் “பாஸ்” ஆகும் வரை மக்கள் காத்திருக்க முடியாது.

தனது ஆட்சி தனக்கும் நாட்டையும் தோல்வியடையச் செய்துள்ளது என்பதை ஜனாதிபதி ஏற்றுக்கொள்ளாவிட்டாலும், "உங்கள் ஆறுதல் மண்டலத்திலிருந்து வெளியேறி மற்றவர்களுக்கு ஆறுதல் கொடுங்கள்" என்று போராட்டக்காரர்கள் கோருகின்றனர். அப்படிக் கத்துபவர்கள் இந்த ஊடகச் செய்தியைப் பார்த்து நொறுங்கிப்போய வேண்டும். கூச்சல் எதிரொலிக்கலாம், மேலும் தீவிரமான, கடுமையான மற்றும் ஆபத்தான செயல்களை ஒளிபரப்பலாம். ஜெபியுங்கள் அது கத்திக்கொண்டே இருக்கும், இரத்தம் தோய்ந்த மூர்க்கத்தனத்துடனும், கொடூரத்துடனும் உலகம் வேறெங்கும் அனுபவித்ததை அல்ல. ஆயினும்கூட, அரசியல்வாதிகள் பொருளாதார மற்றும் அரசியல் பிரச்சினைகளை சரியான நேரத்தில், திறமையாக, திறம்பட தீர்க்காவிட்டால், தற்போதுள்ள பொருளாதார நிலை ஆபத்தான பேரழிவுகளுக்கு விரிவடையும் போன்ற கூக்குரலைத் தூண்டலாம். எல்லா அரசியல்வாதிகளும் இது போன்ற பேரழிவுகளை கவனத்தில் கொள்ளட்டும், அதற்கு உரமிட வேண்டாம்.

en.title: President Rajapaksa Does not  hear the  Resounding “Gota Go Home”  Demand and Instead Hangs on, living   on the  memories of the conflict and the  unprovable 6.9 million  allegedly behind him.
body_lines: The great enemy of the truth is very often not the lie, deliberate, contrived, and dishonest, but the myth, persistent, persuasive, and unrealistic.

In a lighter vein, I amuse that President Kennedy’s above quote would have been partly motivated by a premonition he had of what would happen in Sri Lanka in 2022! What else could one surmise when President Gotabaya Rajapaksa vows “to finish the remaining two years in his term despite months-long street protests calling for his ouster.” True, no President with all attached pomp and glory would depart the comfort zone only due to street protests.

Yet, President Rajapaksa declaring he would not recontest is realistic. It is not only due to street protests but the heard and unheard protests, curses, and complaints in all nooks and corners of Sri Lanka. No one will bargain with such echoing around and contest, to win. If someone says he would contest, it will turn out to be a myth, as President Kennedy said – a lie, deliberate, contrived, and dishonest too. Sure, no one even from the Pohottuwa expects him to contest, because they may face similar consequences as what United National Party contestants experienced in August 2019!

Whether he and the Pohottuwa Government has the mandate and popularity he and his supporters claim could be easily verified on the day he contests or if he wishes to get an early endorsement at the long-delayed Provincial Council Elections. The President’s prior intimation of not seeking reelection shows his conviction of the real popularity, though he does not want to depart immediately.

If he does not stand for reelection because he wishes to focus on “fixing a financial mess” it is well and good, but it will be understood as penance, paid by him since he led the team that caused the country’s economic mess. The new Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe who has taken over this responsibility needs no analysts to educate him.

It is common knowledge that the economic collapse was initiated with the reduction of tax revenue in December 2019, by revisions made to tax slots and Value Added Taxation, alleged duty waivers to friendly importers, and the collapse of farming due to the President’s dream of accelerated organic agriculture combined with prohibiting fertilizer imports, power, and energy supplies restrictions due to dollar shortage, delayed action with the International Monetary Fund and debt restructuring, supported by his grabbing concentrated political power by constitutional amendment manipulations, etc. Entanglement of the economic and political crisis is borne with the last. As the team leader, he is hounded by these errors.

He has gentlemanly accepted responsibility, of course very lightly, regarding two of these, calling them ‘mistakes,’ unknowing they are vast suicidal mistakes. The public wonders whether they should continue with him as the leader and accrue more suffering off his cavalier decision-making (as done already in governing) for the next two years or more. His supporters may in defense say, “Give him another chance!”

“I can’t go as a failed president,” President Rajapaksa has declared lamenting the committed mistakes. His failures have been admitted by him and even Minister Ali Sabry. President must be courageous to admit the rest too, as the leader of the team. He is a soldier, though retired! That is the way of officers and gentlemen.

When he speaks of failures, I can imagine the humorous giggle Ministers Harin Fernando and Manusha Nanayakkara share between them on that count, without embarrassing their political boss. Normally one expects ‘a failure’ to leave making way for another to correct the mistakes he has made. This was what Parliamentarians Harin Fernando and Manusha Nanayakkara yelled as if to bring down the Japanese chandeliers in the House.

But here is a President without a ray of hope or any semblance of showing any concrete corrective action to prove that any corrections are lined up. His only demand is to allow him to hold on to his glory, and show his ‘superiority,’ and ‘greatness,’ though extremely diluted even by prohibition to enter his Secretariat for two months.

One may sympathize with him when he reminds us about a mandate (6.9 million), which in our wildest dreams does not factually exist. No one will say that such a mandate is valid now. This is the understanding of farmers, laborers, public or private sector employees, youth who yell “Gota Go Home,” professionals, academics et al. But he does not hear it and lives on memories of the conflict and unprovable 6.9 million behind him.

The reports on his press briefing I saw (i.e., Business Standard) did not show his concerns on the most urgent issues faced by the community at large. To judge, let us look at one area. It is about essential medicine for children and vulnerable groups. For example, medicine for fits that should be in all pediatric wards or the vaccination against fatal rabies is not available in hospitals. It means children affected by fits must die, and unless the patients can afford to go to Chennai for anti-rabies vaccination must die.

PM Ranil Wickremesinghe with all his might tries to solve the crisis, and the President props up the PM with a business tycoon Dhammika Perera, in the background scenario of mastermind Basil Rajapaksa leaving the government and parliament. It will be interesting to evaluate whether Dhammika Perera could surmount well and truly tattooed failures of the Rajapaksa siblings.

These failures are not only domestic  wishful thinking but internationally identified. Let me quote what Senator Bob Menendez, Chairman of the US Senate Foreign Relations Committee had to say on 10th June 2022, who stated “Under the Rajapaksas, Sri Lanka has been left on the brink of financial ruin and humanitarian catastrophe. Mahinda Rajapaksa led his country straight into a Chinese debt trap and then his brother, Gotabaya Rajapaksa, failed to take the prudent economic steps necessary to avoid a default on its sovereign debt. Today, Sri Lankans of all backgrounds are rising to make clear that it is time for a change.”  This is the change Rajapaksa siblings attempt to halt, nullify! Do not tell that by this quote someone is propping the US, because this was a response to highlighting India’s and Japan’s positive steps in providing humanitarian assistance to Sri Lanka at the QUAD.

Under such circumstances, if he runs through his full term with added failures he will contribute to heightened economic run-down, political uncertainty, social unrest, and dilute and hide constitutional reform. In such an event he would rather have 20A intact as it will be an effective, safe, and beneficial constitutional therapy for him. However, it will certainly blur and delay great intentions and plans made by Namal Rajapaksa to reach the apex, duplicating Bongbong Marcos of the Philippines.

The President said: “What is this executive (powers) of the president? My opinion is that if you have a presidency, he must have full powers. Otherwise, abolish the executive presidency and go for full Westminster-style parliament.” Therefore, his being “skeptical about the success of a planned constitutional amendment” is no surprise. The last two and half years of executive presidency equated to no executive presidency for the good of the people, and his alternate option, (i.e., Westminster style) is not pursued by him either.

His statement that “Either the presidency should be abolished, or the parliament is kept out of governing.” shows his knowledge, understanding, exposure, and attitude toward existing constitutional democratic governance. He added, “I experienced this and now. know.”  What a jubilant period of two years’ experience to comparatively comment on centuries-old concepts like democracy! He suspected people might blame him for this utterance. He is right. If people blame only, not do any other, he ought to be extremely happy, lucky.

The usual past performance as Secretary of Defence is the hashtag he and his supporters wave always. Their conception that being a successful defense administrator or an urban developer qualifies a person more to be a Head of a State is disproved in the last two years plus. Peter’s Principle at work. Hence, even mentioning it to boost up performance becomes exhilarating humor.

Media said, “The president reiterated his controversial goal to push through “natural agriculture,” a short-lived move to ban chemical fertilizers that caused crop output to slump.” If it is to say that irrespective of the failures it is to be continued regardless, that itself will be a blunder.

Hope not so, especially with Indians rescuing our farmers with a credit line of USD 55 million for the procurement of urea fertilizer for the upcoming Yala season from India. The grandeur importance of this saving grace was observed with the PM Ranil Wickremesinghe, Minister of Agriculture Mahinda Amaraweera, Finance Secretary Mahinda Seneviratne, Indian High Commissioner Gopal Baglay, and Chief of PM’s Staff Sagala Ratnayaka, Advisor Dr. RHS Samaratunga and several others being present at the signing of the agreement.

We wish the President all success in bilateral negotiations with foreign heads as stated, with amiable diplomat Aruni Wijewardena in the Foreign Secretariat saddle. Certainly, he would have read the statements by the International Monetary Fund Chief and officials, the World Bank, Samantha Power of the USAID, Prime Minister Narendra Modi et al and educated him on what is required to attract them, especially ‘the political stability.

Further, stability is necessary for the economic and political fronts, and not as Pohottuwa General Secretary or some of his parliamentarians believe. Political stability will depend on constitutional reforms to which he and his party should contribute lavishly, but as appeared not forthcoming due to the citizenship issue affecting Basil Rajapaksa. However, with Basil Rajapaksa out of the equation now intense pressure on him will be reduced.

Therefore, he must observe external developments seriously and find a safe and convenient exit route with the help of PM Wickremesinghe. Planning to return home after two years plus, dashes the hopes of Gota Go Gama protestors who eternally yell, “Gota Go Home now!”

Finally, evaluation of his career as President opens a new learning experience. His contention about the baggage carried by longstanding politicos is right. Having been a short-term politician he also has allegedly seen carrying the baggage of his friends in the Military, business world, political advisors, freed convicts, and groups such as Viyath Maga and Eliya. Their weak support did not make him stronger but messed up his work.

Several of his picks from such entities and ‘baggage’ have deserted him, the latest being the Chairman of Litro who served only a few weeks, Vijitha Herath. Quite unfortunate. He can learn a page from the PM Wickremesinghe, how to pick excellent material from the ‘baggage’ and faithful with the return of Saman Ekanayaka, Dr. RHS Samaratunga, R Paskeralingam, et al to PM’s team, creating hope.

The President has said: “What are these executive (powers) of the president? My opinion is that if you have a presidency, he must have full powers. Otherwise, abolish the executive presidency and go for full Westminster-style parliament.” The turnaround he anticipates is the social demand too. Many agree with him, but demand his returning home immediately, irrespective of legal constraints. Simply told, people cannot wait until he “passes” the next ‘term-test’ on governance.

Though the President may not agree that his governance has failed him and the country, the protestors demand, “Get out of your comfort zone and bring comfort to others.” Those who yell so must be devastated having seen this media report. The yelling may echo, and broadcast more intense, acute, and dangerous actions. Pray it stays at yelling, and not what the world has experienced elsewhere with bloody ferocity and viciousness.  Nevertheless, the existing economic status may provoke such yelling to expand to dangerous calamities, if politicians do not address the economic and political issues properly, timely, efficiently, and effectively. Let all politicians be mindful of such a disaster, and not fertilize such.
